seminarFields.activity_id: Optional string. References ACTIVITIES[].id in lib/activity-config.ts. Empty string when unset.
seminarFields.start_time: HH:MM string. Empty string when unset.
seminarFields.end_time: HH:MM string. Empty string when unset.
seminarFields.custom_label: Display label when type is other. Empty string otherwise.

activityExtensibility.howToSwitch: Change CURRENT_ACTIVITY to another ACTIVITIES entry.
activityExtensibility.howToAdd: Add an ActivityConfig object to ACTIVITIES and update CURRENT_ACTIVITY when needed.
activityExtensibility.futureMultiActivity: Keep activity_id on seminars so calendar and schedule views can select activity-specific configuration with minimal future changes.

operationalRules.commitPushPermission: Do not commit or push without explicit user instruction.
operationalRules.localDevHotReload: Use npm run dev for local hot reload. Do not run npm run build while the dev server is running.
operationalRules.criticalReview: Challenge user proposals and document tradeoffs.
requiredDocTerms: Do not commit or push without explicit user instruction.
Do not run npm run build while the dev server is running.
Challenge user proposals and document tradeoffs.
